options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <out_file> # The name of the LEC dofile to be written.

options.name: -1801_golden
options.description: The name of the golden 1801 file.

options.name: -1801_revised
options.description: The name of the revised 1801 file.

options.name: -checkpoint
options.description: The name of the LEC checkpoint file to write at the end.

options.name: -cpf_golden
options.description: The name of the golden CPF file.

options.name: -cpf_revised
options.description: The name of the revised CPF file.

options.name: -cw_sim
options.description: Specifies the simulation language for ChipWare components. Valid options are 'V1995|V2001|SV|VHDL1987|VHDL1993'.

options.name: -dft_constraint_file
options.description: Specifies a DFT constraints file to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before the comparison.

options.name: -env_var
options.description: The names and values of UNIX environment variables to be used in library, design and log file names in the LEC dofile.

options.name: -fastelab2gen
options.description: Generate an abbreviated LEC dofile for quick elaborated-to-generic comparisons.

options.name: -fastgen2fvmap
options.description: Generate an abbreviated LEC dofile for quick generic-to-fv_map comparisons.

options.name: -fastrtl2elab
options.description: Generate an abbreviated LEC dofile for quick RTL-to-elaborated netlist comparisons.

options.name: -flat
options.description: Use a flat LEC comparison.

options.name: -golden_design
options.description: The path to the golden design.

options.name: -gzip_fv_json
options.description: Compress the implementation information file (requires Conformal 19.10-s300 or newer).

options.name: -hier
options.description: Use a hierarchial LEC comparison.

options.name: -log_file
options.description: The name of the LEC log file.

options.name: -low_power_analysis
options.description: Add Conformal Low Power commands to compare the golden and revised power domains. Power intent must be present.

options.name: -no_dft
options.description: Do not write DFT constraints in the LEC dofile.

options.name: -no_exit
options.description: Skip the exit command at end of the LEC dofile.

options.name: -no_insert_iso_in_dof
options.description: Do not insert isolation in the LEC dofile.

options.name: -no_lp
options.description: Do not check power intent equivalency.

options.name: -post_compare
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just after the comparison.

options.name: -post_read_power_intent
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just after 'read_power_intent'.

options.name: -pre_compare
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before the comparison.

options.name: -pre_exit
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before exiting.

options.name: -pre_read
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before reading the library.

options.name: -pre_read_design
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before 'read_design'.

options.name: -pre_read_power_intent
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before 'read_power_intent'.

options.name: -pre_verification_information
options.description: Specifies a dofile to be sourced from the LEC dofile just before 'set_verification_information'.

options.name: -revised_design
options.description: The path to the revised design.

options.name: -rtl_revised
options.description: The revised design is DFT-inserted, back-annotated RTL.

options.name: -sim_lib
options.description: The Verilog-1995 simulation library.

options.name: -sim_plus_liberty
options.description: Add the simulation library to the synthesis library.

options.name: -smart
options.description: Add adaptive-proof commands and information on parallel hierarchical comparisons to the LEC dofile (requires Conformal Smart LEC license).

options.name: -tmp_dir
options.description: The name of the output LEC directory.

options.name: -top
options.description: The name of the top-level design.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Specifies that the LEC dofile reports verbose information.

options.name: -write_session
options.description: The name of the LEC session to write at the end. (string, optional) > <file> # The name of the LEC dofile to be written.
